name: meetily
description: Privacy-first AI meeting assistant with Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization, built on Rust. 100% local processing.

name: chrome-devtools-mcp
description: Chrome DevTools for coding agents. An MCP server giving AI coding assistants access to a live Chrome for automation, debugging, and performance analysis.

name: cs249r_book
description: Machine Learning Systems: Principles and Practices of Engineering Artificially Intelligent Systems. Open textbook covering ML systems from cloud to edge/tiny.
